headline: RTX (RTX) Stock Could Be 13.2% Undervalued After Revenue Hit US$90.4b
summary: RTX (RTX) recently attracted investor attention after posting annual revenue of US$90.4b and net income of US$7.3b, which has prompted closer scrutiny of how the stock’s recent performance compares with its longer term track record. See our latest analysis for RTX. RTX’s share price has climbed 9.11% over the past month to US$186.77, even after a 90 day period that left the stock down 8.70%, while its 5 year total shareholder return of 138.61% points to a longer term record that investors are...

headline: RTX Stock Has Carved Out a New Price Floor and Is Headed Higher. The Chart Says More Gains Are Likely in Store.
summary: RTX (RTX) shares have successfully carved out a robust, multi-week price floor, and now appear to have a higher trajectory. The stock currently carries an 8% “Sell” overall technical opinion from Barchart, up from 56% a month ago. The trend is shifting up. Near-term momentum indicators have turned sharply constructive,...

headline: 1 Profitable Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Ignore
summary: While profitability is essential, it doesn’t guarantee long-term success. Some companies that rest on their margins will lose ground as competition intensifies — as Jeff Bezos said, “Your margin is my opportunity”.
